title: Livestock Disease Detection Using Hybrid Quantum-Classical Neural Networks
description: Developed a Hybrid Quantum-Classical Neural Network (HQCNN) architecture for livestock disease classification using image datasets. The system combines deep learning-based feature extraction with quantum computing techniques to improve classification performance.

title: Personalized Nutrition Health Optimizer
description: Designed and developed an AI-powered recommendation system that provides personalized dietary suggestions based on diseases, deficiencies, and nutritional requirements.

title: Business Analytics Dashboard
description: Created an interactive business analytics dashboard to visualize KPIs, business metrics, trends, and performance indicators for better decision-making.
